documents.result_message: Our detector is highly confident that the text is written by AI.
documents.inputText:
I started writing this at 11 pm because my brain finally let go of the
spreadsheet I'd been chewing on all day. Three rows in pivot, one merged cell
that wasn't supposed to be merged, and the AVERAGEIFS was quietly skipping
blanks because somebody had typed "n/a" into a column expecting numbers. I
killed the merge, swapped the n/a's for empty cells, and the pivot finally
agreed with the source-of-truth dashboard. Tiny win. Still annoyed about the
two hours.

streamline operations and foster a culture of continuous improvement.
harnessing the power of artificial intelligence, stakeholders can unlock new
opportunities and drive transformative growth across the enterprise.

documents.inputText:
In today's rapidly evolving landscape, it is important to leverage data-driven
insights to navigate complex challenges. Furthermore, organizations must
streamline operations and foster a culture of continuous improvement. By
harnessing the power of artificial intelligence, stakeholders can unlock new
opportunities and drive transformative growth across the enterprise.

blocks.text:
I started writing this at 11 pm because my brain finally let go of the
spreadsheet I'd been chewing on all day.

Three rows in pivot, one merged cell
that wasn't supposed to be merged, and the AVERAGEIFS was quietly skipping
blanks because somebody had typed "n/a" into a column expecting numbers.

I
killed the merge, swapped the n/a's for empty cells, and the pivot finally
agreed with the source-of-truth dashboard.

Tiny win. Still annoyed about the
two hours.

killed the merge, swapped the n/a's for empty cells, and the pivot finally
agreed with the source-of-truth dashboard. Tiny win. Still annoyed about the
two hours.

blocks.text:
In today's rapidly evolving landscape, it is important to leverage data-driven
insights to navigate complex challenges.

Furthermore, organizations must
streamline operations and foster a culture of continuous improvement.

By
harnessing the power of artificial intelligence, stakeholders can unlock new
opportunities and drive transformative growth across the enterprise.
